sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105770" key="tru/xwsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρύχωσις</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῡ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n105770.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">exhaustion, distress,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:34:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.Tyr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">34.2</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
